data.title: stub-flaky Output
data.description: Output produced by stub-flaky on final success.

succeededOnAttempt.title: Succeeded On Attempt
succeededOnAttempt.description: The 1-based attempt number on which the task succeeded (equals failUntilAttempt + 1).

failUntilAttempt.title: Configured N
failUntilAttempt.description: The failUntilAttempt value that was used.
